name: vault-health
description: Example declarative extension that combines local link, task, tag, and publish metadata with Forge's supported vault-health view.

permissions.reason: Uses the local note index, link graph, tags, tasks, and publish metadata already available to Forge.

contributes.label: Vault health metadata
contributes.description: Declares existing Forge metadata fields that are useful for local vault-health checks.

contributes.label: Vault health
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported vault-health workspace view for local cleanup checks.
